announcements.title: School Start Dates 2026
announcements.details: Elementary and Middle School starts August 6, 2026 at 8:00 AM. High School starts August 6, 2026 at 8:30 AM.

providers.name: John's AC & Heating
providers.service: AC repair and heating only. Does NOT do appliance or fridge repair.

providers.name: Fix-It Fast Appliances
providers.service: Fridge, washer, dryer, and appliance repair only.
